_comment: ENHANCEMENT-5 sample fixture for the prompt A/B testing harness. Three hand-written inputs, no PII. Real fixture sets would draw sampled inputs from the interactions log, scrubbed of identifiers, and would include parallel English / Spanish samples to match LMN Crew app's bilingual marketing surface. See granum-v2/specs/05-prompt-ab-testing-harness.md.

inputs.label: Mowing job, casual phrasing with abbreviations
inputs.rawNote: mowed the front, did some edging on the side, weed wack along driveway. blower at the end. customer wasnt home

inputs.label: Hedge trimming with crew handoff context
inputs.rawNote: trimmed boxwood hedges out front, took about 90 min, the guy on the second crew said they got the back yesterday so we skipped it. bagged everything.

inputs.label: Mixed maintenance with weather note and follow-up flag
inputs.rawNote: rain held off long enough to get the lawn cut and the perennial bed deadheaded. noticed the irrigation head by the mailbox is leaking, marked it for the tech.
